name: yt-ribosome
description: Single-plugin marketplace for yt-ribosome: YouTube transcription and translation skills for Claude Code.

plugins.name: yt-ribosome
plugins.description: Transcribe YouTube videos/playlists into Markdown (yt-dlp captions with OpenAI gpt-4o-transcribe/whisper fallback), then translate transcripts into any language via OpenAI or Gemini.
